name: ControlEnableDisable
author: al~
description: allows for safe enabling/disabling of plugin jars in the plugins folder.

commands.label: enable
commands.description: Enable plugins from your discord client!
commands.usageinfo: use this command followed by the name of the plugin e.g. ^enable myplugin

commands.label: disable
commands.description: Disable plugins from your discord client!
commands.usageinfo: use this command followed by the name of the plugin e.g. ^disable myplugin
